roadmapScope: Planning only. No L4 proof implementation is introduced before Behaviour Proven certification.

substrateDependencies: Tenant identity (record + FQDN) depends on PostgresIdentityAdapter; failures must fail closed or degrade explicitly
implementationRisks: Tenant identity (record + FQDN) depends on PostgresIdentityAdapter; failures must fail closed or degrade explicitly
production-shape routing with sandbox external egress and observability enabled
staging uses the real secret-manager pattern with sandbox credentials and rotation rehearsal
tenant data access must preserve permission checks, RLS/tenant isolation, and audit evidence
capabilities.substrateProofStrategy: Reuse the certified L3 behavioural contract unchanged; run the same expectations against compose-local real providers and compare behavioural parity without introducing new behavioural assertions.
